scripts.build: pnpm content:check && cross-env ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build
scripts.check: cross-env ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check && pnpm content:check
scripts.content:check: node scripts/editorial/check-content.mjs && node scripts/editorial/check-editorial-planning.mjs && node scripts/editorial/check-ai-visuals.mjs && node scripts/editorial/check-volume-covers.mjs && node scripts/editorial/check-publishing-schedule.mjs && node scripts/editorial/check-reader-facing-copy.mjs
